title: taraxacum latebracteatum
intro: Taraxacum latebracteatum, also known as the Late-bract dandelion or Taiwan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum latebracteatum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent diseases.
